title: Samantha's Starlit Dream
author: Dady Fredy
subtitle: A Bedtime Story by Dady Fredy

pages.title: Samantha's Starlit Dream
pages.subtitle: A Bedtime Story by Dady Fredy

lines: When the moon climbs high and the world grows still,
And the stars line up on the windowsill,
And floats away through the purple skies.
